scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/server && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/server && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
